{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "SessionStart",
    "additionalContext": "<EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
You have superpowers.

**Below is the full content of your 'superpowers:using-superpowers' skill - your introduction to using skills. For all other skills, use the 'Skill' tool:**

---
name: using-superpowers
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring skill invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
---

<SUBAGENT-STOP>
If you were dispatched as a subagent to execute a specific task, ignore this skill.
</SUBAGENT-STOP>

<EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>
If you think there is even a 1% chance a skill might apply to what you are doing, you ABSOLUTELY MUST invoke the skill.

IF A SKILL APPLIES TO YOUR TASK, YOU DO NOT HAVE A CHOICE. YOU MUST USE IT.

This is not negotiable. You cannot rationalize your way out of this.
</EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>

## The Rule

**Invoke relevant or requested skills BEFORE any response or action** — including clarifying questions, exploring the codebase, or checking files. If it turns out wrong for the situation, you don't have to use it.

**Before entering plan mode:** if you haven't already brainstormed, invoke the brainstorming skill first.

Then announce "Using [skill] to [purpose]" and follow the skill exactly. If it has a checklist, create a todo per item.

## Skill Priority

When multiple skills apply, process skills come first — they set the approach, then implementation skills (frontend-design, etc.) carry it out. Brainstorming and systematic-debugging are Superpowers' most common process skills, but the rule holds for any of them.

- "Let's build X" → superpowers:brainstorming first, then implementation skills.
- "Fix this bug" → superpowers:systematic-debugging first, then domain skills.

## Red Flags

These thoughts mean STOP—you're rationalizing:

| Thought | Reality |
|---------|---------|
| "This is just a simple question" | Questions are tasks. Check for skills. |
| "I need more context first" | Skill check comes BEFORE clarifying questions. |
| "Let me explore the codebase first" | Skills tell you HOW to explore. Check first. |
| "I can check git/files quickly" | Files lack conversation context. Check for skills. |
| "Let me gather information first" | Skills tell you HOW to gather information. |
| "This doesn't need a formal skill" | If a skill exists, use it. |
| "I remember this skill" | Skills evolve. Read current version. |
| "This doesn't count as a task" | Action = task. Check for skills. |
| "The skill is overkill" | Simple things become complex. Use it. |
| "I'll just do this one thing first" | Check BEFORE doing anything. |
| "This feels productive" | Undisciplined action wastes time. Skills prevent this. |
| "I know what that means" | Knowing the concept ≠ using the skill. Invoke it. |

## Platform Adaptation

If your harness appears here, read its reference file for special instructions:

- Codex: `references/codex-tools.md`
- Pi: `references/pi-tools.md`
- Antigravity: `references/antigravity-tools.md`

## User Instructions

User instructions (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, etc, direct requests) take precedence over skills, which in turn override default behavior. Only skip skill workflows or instructions when your human partner has explicitly told you to.
</EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>"
  }
}

content.text:
Please analyze this codebase and create a CLAUDE.md file, which will be given to future instances of Claude Code to operate in this repository.

What to add:
1. Commands that will be commonly used, such as how to build, lint, and run tests. Include the necessary commands to develop in this codebase, such as how to run a single test.
2. High-level code architecture and structure so that future instances can be productive more quickly. Focus on the "big picture" architecture that requires reading multiple files to understand.

Usage notes:
- If there's already a CLAUDE.md, suggest improvements to it.
- When you make the initial CLAUDE.md, do not repeat yourself and do not include obvious instructions like "Provide helpful error messages to users", "Write unit tests for all new utilities", "Never include sensitive information (API keys, tokens) in code or commits".
- Avoid listing every component or file structure that can be easily discovered.
- Don't include generic development practices.
- If there are Cursor rules (in .cursor/rules/ or .cursorrules) or Copilot rules (in .github/copilot-instructions.md), make sure to include the important parts.
- If there is a README.md, make sure to include the important parts.
- Do not make up information such as "Common Development Tasks", "Tips for Development", "Support and Documentation" unless this is expressly included in other files that you read.
- Be sure to prefix the file with the following text:

```
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
```

addedLines: - backend-architect: Design reliable backend systems with focus on data integrity, security, and fault tolerance (Tools: All tools)

- business-panel-experts: Multi-expert business strategy panel synthesizing Christensen, Porter, Drucker, Godin, Kim & Mauborgne, Collins, Taleb, Meadows, and Doumont; supports sequential, debate, and Socratic modes. (Tools: All tools)
- claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions ("Can Claude...", "Does Claude...", "How do I...") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - Messages API for directly passing messages to Claude, Tool Runner (`client.beta.messages.tool_runner`) for running an agentic loop over your own tools, manual tool-use loops, Managed Agents for server-hosted agents with a managed sandbox, prompt caching, and general Anthropic SDK usage; (4) Claude Tag (Claude in Slack) - what it is, setting it up for a Slack workspace, `/install-slack-app`. **IMPORTANT:** Before spawning a new agent, check if there is already a running or recently completed claude-code-guide agent that you can continue via SendMessage. (Tools: Glob, Grep, Read, WebFetch, WebSearch)

- codex:codex-rescue: Proactively use when Claude Code is stuck, wants a second implementation or diagnosis pass, needs a deeper root-cause investigation, or should hand a substantial coding task to Codex through the shared runtime (Tools: Bash)
- devops-architect: Automate infrastructure and deployment processes with focus on reliability and observability (Tools: All tools)

- Explore: Fast read-only search agent for locating code. Use it to find files by pattern (eg. "src/components/**/*.tsx"), grep for symbols or keywords (eg. "API endpoints"), or answer "where is X defined / which files reference Y." Do NOT use it for code review, design-doc auditing, cross-file consistency checks, or open-ended analysis — it reads excerpts rather than whole files and will miss content past its read window. When calling, specify search breadth: "quick" for a single targeted lookup, "medium" for moderate exploration, or "very thorough" to search across multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- frontend-architect: Create accessible, performant user interfaces with focus on user experience and modern frameworks (Tools: All tools)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)
- learning-guide: Teach programming concepts and explain code with focus on understanding through progressive learning and practical examples (Tools: All tools)
- performance-engineer: Optimize system performance through measurement-driven analysis and bottleneck elimination (Tools: All tools)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- python-expert: Deliver production-ready, secure, high-performance Python code following SOLID principles and modern best practices (Tools: All tools)
- quality-engineer: Ensure software quality through comprehensive testing strategies and systematic edge case detection (Tools: All tools)
- refactoring-expert: Improve code quality and reduce technical debt through systematic refactoring and clean code principles (Tools: All tools)
- requirements-analyst: Transform ambiguous project ideas into concrete specifications through systematic requirements discovery and structured analysis (Tools: All tools)
- root-cause-analyst: Systematically investigate complex problems to identify underlying causes through evidence-based analysis and hypothesis testing (Tools: All tools)
- security-engineer: Identify security vulnerabilities and ensure compliance with security standards and best practices (Tools: All tools)
- socratic-mentor: Educational guide specializing in Socratic method for programming knowledge with focus on discovery learning through strategic questioning (Tools: All tools)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)
- system-architect: Design scalable system architecture with focus on maintainability and long-term technical decisions (Tools: All tools)
- technical-writer: Create clear, comprehensive technical documentation tailored to specific audiences with focus on usability and accessibility (Tools: All tools)

## plugin:context7:context7
Use this server to fetch current documentation whenever the user asks about a library, framework, SDK, API, CLI tool, or cloud service — even well-known ones like React, Next.js, Prisma, Express, Tailwind, Django, or Spring Boot. This includes API syntax, configuration, version migration, library-specific debugging, setup instructions, and CLI tool usage. Use even when you think you know the answer — your training data may not reflect recent changes. Prefer this over web search for library docs.

Do not use for: refactoring, writing scripts from scratch, debugging business logic, code review, or general programming concepts.

## plugin:serena:serena
CRITICAL: Before starting to work on a coding task, call the `initial_instructions` tool to read the 'Serena Instructions Manual'.

attachment.content:
- claude-mem-curate: 把 claude-mem 抽出的 shortlist 精選成少量繁體中文、去重後寫進 AIMemory。當使用者說「精選/整理 claude-mem」「把最近重點存記憶」,或每日自動 ingestion 時使用。
- dual-skill-review-loop: Use when producing any deliverable that needs quality assurance — writing, reports, proposals, code designs — and you want the output to reach ≥95 score through structured self-review iterations
- excel-to-ai-doc: Convert image-heavy Excel game spec spreadsheets (.xlsx) into an AI-readable knowledge structure — Markdown text + extracted original images (anchored to their source cells) + metadata.json. Use when the user wants to turn a 規格書/spec/design xlsx into something an AI or agent can read, asks to "convert this spec to markdown", "make this xlsx AI-readable", "extract images and tables from this spreadsheet for analysis", or needs to feed a slot/game spec workbook to a vision model. Triggers on game design specs, paytables, UI/flow screenshots embedded in .xlsx. NOT for clean tabular data exports (use a plain csv/markdown converter) or non-xlsx files.
- huashu-slides: AI演示文稿全流程制作：内容结构化→设计选型→AI插画/HTML构建→PPTX导出。17种实战验证的视觉风格（漫画/极简/数据叙事/国风），可编辑HTML与全AI视觉两条路径自由选择。当用户提到"做PPT"、"制作幻灯片"、"演示文稿"、"Keynote"、"slides"、"课件"、"汇报材料"、"路演"时使用。
- knowhow-accumulation: Use when capturing lessons from AI failures into structured ❌→✅ records, when reviewing past interactions to extract reusable patterns, or when building a self-improving knowledge base from repeated mistakes
- memory-to-skill: 當使用者要求「檢視 session 資料夾並把內容整理成 skill」、需要從過去對話中抽取可重用模式、或要把剛剛完成的工作經驗固化成 skill 時使用
- ms-agent-scheduled-prompts: 當需要為 LLM agent bridge（Telegram bot、Slack bot、CLI UI）做延遲 / 常態性 prompt 觸發、排程 bridge 指令（如每天凌晨 /restart）、或要在 agent 回覆裡嵌 token 讓使用者自助建排程時使用
- ms-agent-text-token-signaling: 當 LLM agent 需要觸發 host 端動作（傳檔、開網址、執行指令）但協定不允許 agent 端發起自訂 RPC、或想在 streaming 文字回覆中加上 side effect 又不破壞聊天 UX 時使用
- ms-external-repo-absorption: ms-external-repo-absorption
- ms-kiro-strreplace-silent-fail: 當用 Kiro 的 strReplace 或 fs-edit 類工具改檔、tool 回報 Successfully replaced N occurrences 但事後 grep / read 發現磁碟內容沒變、或同一個檔案連續發幾個 strReplace 只有部分生效時使用
- ms-portable-skill-authoring: 當寫 skill 會被多個 agent CLI（Kiro / Codex / Claude）或多台機器共用、要避免把 F:\AI\AIMemory 或 ~/.kiro 這類絕對路徑寫死在 SKILL.md、或要讓 bridge 把環境差異注入成變數讓同一份 SKILL.md 跨機器重用時使用
- ms-streaming-token-pipeline: Use when a Telegram/Slack bot streams text via mid-turn edits plus a final render. Both paths must share one transform, or ASK buttons drop, half-tokens leak, and rate-limit recovery overwrites it.
- ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol: Use when emitting <<ASK:...>> for Telegram bridge buttons, or when an ASK token renders verbatim. Label soft cap 20 chars; >20 SHALL use numbered body list with short labels. See SKILL.md for limits.
- ms-telegram-bot-rate-limit-survival: 當 Telegram bot 對使用者 chat 串 streaming edit 或連發多則訊息、遇到 429 Too Many Requests / retry_after 愈累積愈長（60s→183s）、grammY autoRetry 超過 maxDelaySeconds 拋錯、或需要設計「限流期間凍結 UI + 限流結束後自動補發」時使用
- ms-wiki-knowledge-base: 當 agent bridge 要維運雙層記憶（facts + wiki 知識庫）時使用：執行 wikisync（topic shard 蒸餾成 wiki 頁）、factlint（facts 去重/去瑣碎/衰減/升格偵測）、wikilint（wiki 過時/孤兒/斷連健康檢查），或要為新 bridge 設計同款 wiki 維運流程時使用
- ms-windows-shell-exit-code-false-positive: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中跑 git clone、pip install、npm install、winget 等命令時，明明工作完成卻收到 exit code 1、stderr 有進度條或 notice、shell tool 回報失敗時使用
- ms-windows-shell-interactive-prompt: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中執行讀檔、列目錄、搜尋指令（Get-Content、type、cat、more）導致 tool call 卡住不回、或在 Kiro agent 與 ACP bridge 裡看到 PowerShell 的互動式參數詢問（例如 Path 參數提示）時使用
- non-engineer-agent-design: Use when designing Custom GPT / Claude Project / Gemini Gem instructions for non-engineers, or when helping someone structure their AI workflow using the 5-piece framework (Agent, Skill, Steering, Hook, KnowHow)
- self-eval-prompt-pattern: Use when designing prompts or instructions that require AI to self-assess quality before delivering output, when setting up automated quality gates in Custom GPT / Project / Gem instructions, or when AI outputs need measurable pass/fail criteria
- skill-creator: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
- sync-fork-from-upstream: 當使用者要把自己的 fork / 下游倉庫同步到原專案（upstream）的最新更新時使用。觸發語包含「同步原專案」「拿上游更新」「sync upstream」「更新原專案」「原本的倉庫有更新怎麼拉」。涵蓋一次性 upstream remote 設定、半自動同步流程（fetch → 拋棄式分支試合併 → 型別檢查 → 停在衝突/失敗、絕不自動 push）、以及 fork 與 upstream 無共同歷史時的「重新接血脈」做法。
- ui-ux-pro-max: ui-ux-pro-max
- uk-slot-codegen: UK slot codegen 統一入口。使用者提供規格路徑+目標專案路徑，自動串接 adapter→codegen→validation 全流程。支援新專案/增量更新/僅驗證三種模式，每步 checkpoint 可中斷恢復。
- uk-slot-extrabet: UK 老虎機 ExtraBet（額外押注/加倍投注）子系統指南。建立、修改、除錯 ExtraBet 功能，或處理 unshow/replay 還原、單倍率單步驟 / 多倍率兩步驟跳窗變體、多倍率 type 時觸發。涵蓋 framework ExtraBetComponent / extraBetController、專案 ExtraBetWindow 跳窗、ExtraBetEffectManager 動畫、SlotReels 假轉輪整合、GameView 整合多方關係。
- uk-slot-fake-reel-manager: FakeReelManager 假轉輪帶建立、修改、檢查或擴充
- uk-slot-multilang-sync: 把規格 xlsx 的多國語言文字批次同步進 uk 線上老虎機框架各語系的 gameStrings.xml。當使用者要在老虎機專案新增/更新多國語言字串、提到 「gameStrings.xml」「多國語言」「多語系文字」「i18n 字串」「把 xlsx 的翻譯填進去」、 或要為某個 Key 一次寫入多國(常見 26 國)文字時使用。僅適用線上部門 uk 框架 (plist 格式 gameStrings.xml、每語系一目錄、欄標題括號內為語系代碼); 商用部門或其他文字格式不適用。
- uk-slot-pattern-library: uk-slot-pattern-library
- uk-slot-project-docs: uk-slot-project-docs
- uk-slot-spec-to-impl: 當拿到一份 UK 老虎機遊戲規格書（xlsx）要開發新遊戲、使用者說「從規格書實作」「開新的 slot 專案」「規格書轉開發規格」、或要為新遊戲起專案/拆任務時使用。涵蓋 xlsx 轉換、差異開發規格、milestone 任務拆解三步驟。
- uk-slot-state-machine: UK 老虎機狀態機設定，新增、移除或修改 SetStateMachine() 遊戲狀態時觸發。
- vc-kiro-delegate: 將實作任務委派給 Kiro CLI（headless mode + claude-opus-4.6）執行，把主 agent 的 Claude Max 5x 配額（5 小時 message cap）保留給協調與決策，把實作丟給 Kiro 的不限量訂閱算力。Claude Code 負責預估、規劃、light review；Kiro 負責具體實作與第一輪 self-review。當用戶說「用 kiro 做」「交給 kiro」「省 token」「叫 kiro 寫」時務必使用此 skill；當主 agent 自己評估某個任務「預估會花 2k+ tokens」時也要主動委派 — 例如新增函式、寫測試、重構函式、實作模組。即使用戶沒明說「kiro」，只要預估產出規模 ≥2k tokens，就主動委派並在訊息中告知預估值。
- writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- dev:init-claude: dev:init-claude — 開發設計閉環初始化
- sc:analyze: Comprehensive code analysis across quality, security, performance, and architecture domains
- sc:brainstorm: Interactive requirements discovery through Socratic dialogue and systematic exploration
- sc:build: Build, compile, and package projects with intelligent error handling and optimization
- sc:business-panel: /sc:business-panel - Business Panel Analysis System
- sc:cleanup: Systematically clean up code, remove dead code, and optimize project structure
- sc:design: Design system architecture, APIs, and component interfaces with comprehensive specifications
- sc:document: Generate focused documentation for components, functions, APIs, and features
- sc:estimate: Provide development estimates for tasks, features, or projects with intelligent analysis
- sc:explain: Provide clear explanations of code, concepts, and system behavior with educational clarity
- sc:git: Git operations with intelligent commit messages and workflow optimization
- sc:help: List all available /sc commands and their functionality
- sc:implement: Feature and code implementation with intelligent persona activation and MCP integration
- sc:improve: Apply systematic improvements to code quality, performance, and maintainability
- sc:index: Generate comprehensive project documentation and knowledge base with intelligent organization
- sc:load: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for project context loading
- sc:reflect: Task reflection and validation using Serena MCP analysis capabilities
- sc:save: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for session context persistence
- sc:select-tool: Intelligent MCP tool selection based on complexity scoring and operation analysis
- sc:spawn: Meta-system task orchestration with intelligent breakdown and delegation
- sc:spec-panel: Multi-expert specification review and improvement using renowned specification and software engineering experts
- sc:task: Execute complex tasks with intelligent workflow management and delegation
- sc:test: Execute tests with coverage analysis and automated quality reporting
- sc:troubleshoot: Diagnose and resolve issues in code, builds, deployments, and system behavior
- sc:workflow: Generate structured implementation workflows from PRDs and feature requirements
- uk-conventions: 把 UK 老虎機開發規範（禁改公版 + 命名規則）寫入當前專案的 CLAUDE.md（冪等，不重複貼）
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dev-design: 架構設計 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 1+1b）：多方案 judge-panel → 對抗驗證砍缺陷 → 設計規格（含 BC-x）。承重核（因果鏈+事實求證）注入每個 agent。
- dev-prd: PRD / 需求探索 workflow（新能力，原方法論無 PRD 階段）：多角度需求探索（problem/user/scope）→ 塑形候選（lean/complete）→ 對抗挑戰 → PRD 文件。事實求證確保需求前提不是憑空假設。
- dev-review: 品質+安全審查 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 3）：parallel 多視角審查（correctness/security/repro lens）→ 對抗驗證 findings。異源 skeptic 打破同源自審天花板（#007）。
- dev-verify: 跨產出物自證 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 5，可選）：可枚舉項用 adversarial-verify；反向遍歷（找死碼/未實作）用輕量 verifier agent（這是 adversarial-verify 結構上蓋不到的缺口）。
- claude-md-management:revise-claude-md: Update CLAUDE.md with learnings from this session
- claude-mem:do: Execute a plan using subagents for implementation
- claude-mem:make-plan: Create an implementation plan with documentation discovery
- codex:rescue: Delegate investigation, an explicit fix request, or follow-up rescue work to the Codex rescue subagent
- codex:setup: Check whether the local Codex CLI is ready and optionally toggle the stop-time review gate
- webwright:craft: Craft a reusable Webwright CLI tool by parameterizing a web task.
- webwright:run: Run a one-shot web task with the Webwright Playwright workflow.
- claude-md-management:claude-md-improver: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files in repositories. Use when user asks to check, audit, update, improve, or fix CLAUDE.md files. Scans for all CLAUDE.md files, evaluates quality against templates, outputs quality report, then makes targeted updates. Also use when the user mentions "CLAUDE.md maintenance" or "project memory optimization".
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup
- superpowers:receiving-code-review: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
- superpowers:requesting-code-review: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
- superpowers:systematic-debugging: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
- superpowers:test-driven-development: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - ensures an isolated workspace exists via native tools or git worktree fallback
- superpowers:using-superpowers: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring skill invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
- superpowers:verification-before-completion: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
- superpowers:writing-plans: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
- superpowers:writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- claude-mem:mem-search: Search claude-mem's persistent cross-session memory database. Use when user asks "did we already solve this?", "how did we do X last time?", or needs work from previous sessions.
- codex:codex-cli-runtime: Internal helper contract for calling the codex-companion runtime from Claude Code
- codex:codex-result-handling: Internal guidance for presenting Codex helper output back to the user
- codex:gpt-5-4-prompting: Internal guidance for composing Codex and GPT-5.4 prompts for coding, review, diagnosis, and research tasks inside the Codex Claude Code plugin
- webwright:webwright: Solve a user-specified web task code-as-action style by driving a local Playwright browser through one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into `final_runs/run_<id>/`, and visually verifying the result. Use when the user asks to automate a web task (search, filter, form-fill, multi-step flow, data extraction) and wants reusable scripts plus screenshot evidence rather than a one-shot answer.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:a11y-debugging: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP for accessibility (a11y) debugging and auditing based on web.dev guidelines. Use when testing semantic HTML, ARIA labels, focus states, keyboard navigation, tap targets, and color contrast.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:chrome-devtools: Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for efficient debugging, troubleshooting and browser automation. Use when debugging web pages, automating browser interactions, analyzing performance, or inspecting network requests. This skill does not apply to `--slim` mode (MCP configuration).
- chrome-devtools-mcp:chrome-devtools-cli: Use this skill to write shell scripts or run shell commands to automate tasks in the browser or otherwise use Chrome DevTools via CLI.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:debug-optimize-lcp: Guides debugging and optimizing Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) using Chrome DevTools MCP tools. Use this skill whenever the user asks about LCP performance, slow page loads, Core Web Vitals optimization, or wants to understand why their page's main content takes too long to appear. Also use when the user mentions "largest contentful paint", "page load speed", "CWV", or wants to improve how fast their hero image or main content renders.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:memory-leak-debugging: Diagnoses and resolves memory leaks in JavaScript/Node.js applications. Use when a user reports high memory usage, OOM errors, or wants to analyze heapsnapshots or run memory leak detection tools like memlab.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:troubleshooting: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP and documentation to troubleshoot connection and target issues. Trigger this skill when list_pages, new_page, or navigate_page fail, or when the server initialization fails.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- artifact-design: Design guidance and fundamentals for Artifacts.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	# Tools_SlotSetUP
2	(tool)
3	
4	# 環境建置
5	1. 把gameSetting.json複製到遊戲資料夾跟目錄並加入版控中。
6	2. 調整gameSetting.json內的Proto的git路徑和branch，如果branch要使用default的話可以放空字串。

file.content:
# Tools_SlotSetUP
(tool)

# 環境建置
1. 把gameSetting.json複製到遊戲資料夾跟目錄並加入版控中。
2. 調整gameSetting.json內的Proto的git路徑和branch，如果branch要使用default的話可以放空字串。
3. 執行FirstClone.bat進行clone。
4. 確認extensions和assets/game/Script/Proto內有東西。
5. 完成。

# 更新
1. 執行Update.bat即可。

1	# 轉輪玩法系統使用說明
2	
3	## 概覽
4	
5	本系統支援三種老虎機轉輪玩法，透過策略模式切換：
6	
7	| SpinMode | 說明 | 狀態機流程 |
8	|----------|------|-----------|
9	| `Standard` | 標準轉輪，停輪後直接報獎 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → AWARD |
10	| `Cascade` | 停輪後消除中獎符號，上方符號天降補位，循環直到無消除 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD |
11	| `Tumble` | 與 Cascade 類似，掉落速度更快，通常搭配乘倍累加 | 同 Cascade |
12	
13	---
14	
15	## 快速開始
16	
17	### 設定 Cascade 模式
18	
19	```typescript
20	import { SpinMode } from "./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy";
21	import { CascadeFillStrategy } from "./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy";
22	
23	// 在 GameView 初始化時
24	this.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new CascadeFillStrategy());
25	```
26	
27	### 設定 Tumble 模式
28	
29	```typescript
30	import { TumbleFillStrategy } from "./FillStrategy/TumbleFillStrategy";
31	
32	this.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Tumble, new TumbleFillStrategy());
33	```
34	
35	### 切回 Standard 模式
36	
37	```typescript
38	this.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard);
39	```
40	
41	---
42	
43	## 調整掉落速度
44	
45	透過 constructor 參數自訂：
46	
47	```typescript
48	// CascadeFillStrategy 參數
49	new CascadeFillStrategy({
50	    dropTimePerCell: 0.1,    // 每格掉落時間（秒），越小越快。預設 0.1
51	    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12
52	    bounceTime: 0.05,        // 回彈動畫時間（秒）。預設 0.05
53	    explodeTime: 0.3,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.3
54	})
55	
56	// TumbleFillStrategy 參數
57	new TumbleFillStrategy({
58	    baseDropTime: 0.3,       // 基礎掉落時間（秒）。預設 0.3
59	    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12
60	    bounceUpTime: 0.05,      // 回彈上升時間（秒）。預設 0.05
61	    bounceDownTime: 0.033,   // 回彈下降時間（秒）。預設 0.033
62	    explodeTime: 0.4,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.4
63	})
64	```
65	
66	### 速度計算公式
67	
68	- **Cascade**：掉落時間 = `dropTimePerCell × 掉落格數`
69	- **Tumble**：掉落時間 = `baseDropTime × 掉落格數 / 總行數`
70	
71	---
72	
73	## CascadeFillStrategy 內部三階段流程
74	
75	`fillColumn(col, column, fillSymbols)` 對單列執行的步驟：
76	
77	1. **存活下沉**：把未被消除的符號（aliveRows）視覺上 tween 到 `newCount + i` 的新位置，把空位推到頂部。
78	2. **新符號掉入**：借用 `deadRows[i]` 索引的（被消除、目前隱藏的）cell 當作載體 — 直接 `cell.ChangeSymbol()` 換 sprite + 從畫面外 tween 落到 `getFixedNode(col, i).position`。
79	3. **重排索引**：tween 完成後呼叫 `column.RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)`，把 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols` 陣列索引對齊視覺位置（例如原本在 row 0 的存活 cell，視覺上移到了 row 2，重排後就成為 `m_singleCells[2]`）。
80	
81	### 為什麼要重排？
82	
83	- 存活 cell 視覺上「沉降」是用 tween 移動節點，但 `m_singleCells[r]` 是用陣列索引綁定的
84	- 若不重排，下一輪 explode 拿到 `m_singleCells[r]` 會跟視覺對不上，導致消除錯位
85	- 重排只動陣列順序，**不會碰 sprite、座標或 active 狀態**
86	
87	### 與 ColumnSymbol 的耦合
88	
89	實作依賴 `ColumnSymbol` 提供：
90	- `NodeCount` — 該列可見行數（每列不一定相同）
91	- `GetSingleCell(row)`、`GetSymbolAt(row)`、`SetSymbolAt(row, id)` — cell 存取
92	- `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` — 重排陣列索引
93	
94	座標系完全使用 `getFixedNode(col, row)`（由 `SlotReels` 在 `SetSpinMode` 時注入），不再依賴 `ColumnSymbol.CalPosY`，因為後者用對稱中心算的座標與場景上手動擺放的固定節點對不上。
95	
96	---
97	
98	## 加入消除動畫
99	
100	### 方式一：調整等待時間（最簡單）
101	
102	只需加大 `explodeTime`，在外部（如 EffectStartState）播放特效：
103	
104	```typescript
105	new CascadeFillStrategy({ explodeTime: 0.8 }) // 給更多時間播放特效
106	```
107	
108	### 方式二：覆寫 explode 方法（推薦）
109	
110	建立子類別，在消除時播放 Spine 或粒子特效：
111	
112	```typescript
113	import { CascadeFillStrategy } from "./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy";
114	import { ExplodeData } from "./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy";
115	
116	export class MyGameFillStrategy extends CascadeFillStrategy {
117	
118	    // 覆寫消除方法
119	    async explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {
120	        const promises: Promise<void>[] = [];
121	
122	        for (const pos of data.positions) {
123	            const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);
124	            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;
125	            const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);
126	
127	            if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {
128	                // 播放消除特效（依你的遊戲需求）
129	                promises.push(this.playExplodeEffect(cell.ThisNode));
130	            }
131	        }
132	
133	        await Promise.all(promises);
134	    }
135	
136	    private playExplodeEffect(node: Node): Promise<void> {
137	        return new Promise(resolve => {
138	            // 範例：縮放消失動畫
139	            tween(node)
140	                .to(0.2, { scale: v3(1.3, 1.3, 1) })
141	                .to(0.1, { scale: v3(0, 0, 1) })
142	                .call(() => resolve())
143	                .start();
144	        });
145	    }
146	}
147	```
148	
149	使用：
150	```typescript
151	this.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new MyGameFillStrategy());
152	```
153	
154	### 方式三：搭配 PrefabPoolManager（進階）
155	
156	```typescript
157	async explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {
158	    for (const pos of data.positions) {
159	        const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);
160	        const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;
161	        const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);
162	
163	        if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {
164	            // 從物件池取得特效 Prefab
165	            const fx = PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().get("ExplodeFX");
166	            fx.setWorldPosition(cell.ThisNode.worldPosition);
167	            fx.parent = this.effectLayer;
168	
169	            // 播放完後回收
170	            this.scheduleOnce(() => {
171	                PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().put("ExplodeFX", fx);
172	            }, 0.5);
173	        }
174	    }
175	
176	    await this.delay(0.5); // 等待特效播放完
177	}
178	```
179	
180	---
181	
182	## 加入補位音效
183	
184	在子類別中覆寫 `fill` 方法：
185	
186	```typescript
187	async fill(data: FillData): Promise<void> {
188	    // 先執行原本的補位動畫（含存活下沉 + 新符號掉入 + 陣列重排）
189	    await super.fill(data);
190	
191	    // 播放落地音效
192	    AudioManager.Play("Symbol_Drop");
193	}
194	```
195	
196	> ⚠️ 若你需要更細的控制（例如「存活下沉時播一個音、新符號掉入時播另一個」），
197	> 建議覆寫 `fillColumn` 而非 `fill`，並保留三階段流程（存活下沉 → 新符號掉入 → `RearrangeSingleCells`）。
198	> 跳過第三階段會讓 `m_singleCells` 索引與視覺位置失準，下一輪 explode 會錯位。
199	
200	---
201	
202	## 設定伺服器資料
203	
204	實際連接後端時，在收到 SpinAck 後設定 combo 資料：
205	
206	```typescript
207	// 在 GameView.OnRecvSpinAck() 中
208	public OnRecvSpinAck(ack: ISpinAck): void {
209	    // ... 其他處理 ...
210	
211	    // 若為 Cascade/Tumble 模式，解析多階段資料
212	    if (this.m_slotReels.CurrentSpinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {
213	        const { explodeList, fillList } = this.parseComboData(ack);
214	        this.SetComboData(explodeList, fillList);
215	    }
216	}
217	
218	// 資料轉換（依你的 protocol 格式調整）
219	private parseComboData(ack: ISpinAck) {
220	    const explodeList: ExplodeData[] = [];
221	    const fillList: FillData[] = [];
222	
223	    const roundInfo = ack.RoundQueue[this.CurPlateIndex];
224	    // 假設 protocol 有 ComboStageData 或 PlateQueue
225	    for (const stage of roundInfo.PlateQueue) {
226	        explodeList.push({ positions: stage.EliminatePos });
227	        fillList.push({ fillSymbols: stage.FillSymbols });
228	    }
229	
230	    // 最後加一個空消除（結束循環的信號）
231	    explodeList.push({ positions: [] });
232	
233	    return { explodeList, fillList };
234	}
235	```
236	
237	---
238	
239	## EffectStartState 分流邏輯
240	
241	目前 `EffectStartState` 中有自動注入 mock 資料的邏輯（開發用）。正式上線時改為：
242	
243	```typescript
244	// EffectStartState.OnEnter() 中
245	const spinMode = this.m_gameView.SlotReels?.CurrentSpinMode ?? SpinMode.Standard;
246	if (spinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {
247	    // 正式版：資料已在 OnRecvSpinAck 中設定好
248	    stateManager.NextState(Game_Define.GameState.EXPLODE);
249	    return;
250	}
251	```
252	
253	移除 `ResetComboData()` 和 `SetMockCascadeData()` 的呼叫即可。
254	
255	---
256	
257	## 檔案結構
258	
259	```
260	assets/Script/
261	├── FillStrategy/
262	│   ├── IFillStrategy.ts            # 介面 + SpinMode 枚舉 + 資料型別
263	│   ├── CascadeFillStrategy.ts      # 天降補位策略
264	│   └── TumbleFillStrategy.ts       # 雪崩補位策略
265	├── GameState/
266	│   ├── EffectStartState.ts         # 停輪後分流（Standard vs Cascade/Tumble）
267	│   ├── ExplodeState.ts             # 消除狀態
268	│   └── MatchingPatchUpState.ts     # 補位狀態
269	├── SlotReels.ts                    # 轉輪主類別（SetSpinMode / Explode / Fill）
270	├── GameView.ts                     # combo 資料管理（SetComboData / AdvanceComboIndex）
271	├── Game_Define.ts                  # EXPLODE / MATCHING_PATCH_UP 狀態枚舉
272	└── ReelDevTool.ts                  # 開發測試工具
273	```
274	
275	---
276	
277	## DevTool 測試（Console 指令）
278	
279	```javascript
280	// 取得 DevTool
281	let dt = cc.find("節點路徑").getComponent("ReelDevTool");
282	
283	// 切換模式
284	dt.SetupCascadeMode();    // Cascade
285	dt.SetupTumbleMode();     // Tumble
286	dt.SetupStandardMode();   // Standard
287	
288	// 驗證狀態機流程（純 Log）
289	dt.TestCascadeFlow();
290	dt.TestTumbleFlow();
291	
292	// 手動測試消除/補位
293	dt.TestExplode([0, 1, 2]);
294	dt.TestCascadeFill([[3, 4, 5], [], [], [], []]);
295	
296	// 印出狀態
297	dt.PrintReelStatus();
298	dt.PrintCurrentPlate();
299	```
300	
301	---
302	
303	## 常見問題
304	
305	### Q: 如何讓不同列有不同的掉落延遲？
306	A: 在子類別的 `fillColumn` 中加入列間延遲：
307	```typescript
308	for (let col = 0; col < this.m_columns.length; col++) {
309	    await this.delay(col * 0.05); // 每列延遲 0.05 秒
310	    await this.fillColumn(col, ...);
311	}
312	```
313	
314	### Q: 如何加入 NearWin 聽牌效果？
315	A: NearWin 是 Standard Spin 停輪階段的功能，在 `SlotReels.SetReelTimes()` 中處理，與 FillStrategy 無關。
316	
317	### Q: Cascade 和 Tumble 的差異在哪？
318	A: 邏輯結構相同（都是「存活下沉 + 新符號補位 + 陣列重排」三階段），差異在動畫表現：
319	- Cascade：掉落時間與「實際格數」成正比，每格時間獨立 — 適合中獎線消除
320	- Tumble：掉落時間「除以總行數」，整列同時抵達 — 適合全盤消除（Ways）
321	
322	### Q: 為什麼 Cascade 的 explode 階段要排序 deadRows？
323	A: 因為 `fill` 階段要用 `deadRows[i]` 對應到「視覺上第 i 個頂部空位」，必須由小到大排列，否則新符號會被放到錯誤的載體 cell，重排後索引就亂了。
324	
325	### Q: 多階段 cascade 中為什麼第二次消除拿到的盤面是對的？
326	A: 第一次 `fillColumn` 結尾呼叫 `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` 重排了 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols`，讓 `m_singleCells[r]` 確實對應到視覺上 row r 的 cell。第二次 explode 用 `HideSymbolByRow(row)` 隱藏的 cell 因此與視覺一致。
327	
328	### Q: 如何加入乘倍累加（Tumble 常見）？
329	A: 在 `ExplodeState` 或 `MatchingPatchUpState` 中處理：
330	```typescript
331	// ExplodeState.OnEnter() 中
332	this.m_gameView.CurrentMultiplier += explodeData.positions.length;
333	```
334

1	/**
2	 * @ch 轉輪盤面結構配置
3	 * @description 定義 SlotReels 建構時的盤面結構（層數、每列符號數、假符號策略）。
4	 *              啟動時由 GameView 透過 SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig() 傳入，跑起來後不應變動。
5	 */
6	
7	/**@ch 單列配置 */
8	export interface ColumnConfig {
9	    /**@ch 該列總 cell 數（含緩衝），Standard 模式通常 > visibleSymbolCount */
10	    targetSymbolCount: number;
11	    /**@ch 該列可見行數 */
12	    visibleSymbolCount: number;
13	}
14	
15	/**@ch 盤面結構配置 */
16	export interface ReelLayoutConfig {
17	    /**
18	     * @ch 盤面層數
19	     * @description
20	     *   - 1 = 只有中層（DropEntry 等不需要轉輪帶滾動的玩法）
21	     *   - 3 = 上中下三層（Standard 轉輪滾動需要「無限轉輪帶」視覺）
22	     */
23	    plateCount: 1 | 3;
24	
25	    /**@ch 每列的配置（陣列長度應等於 Game_Define.COL） */
26	    columns: ColumnConfig[];
27	
28	    /**
29	     * @ch 假符號生成策略
30	     *   - 'random' = 按權重隨機（預設）
31	     *   - 'repeat' = 從現有可見符號中重複挑選
32	     */
33	    fakeSymbolStrategy: 'random' | 'repeat';
34	
35	    /**@ch 符號替換時機（剩餘圈數） */
36	    replacementTiming: number;
37	
38	    /**
39	     * @ch 不同高度列之間的垂直對齊方式
40	     * @description 只在「各列 targetSymbolCount 不一致」時會有視覺差異（典型場景：dropEntry 凹字盤面）。
41	     *   - 'center'（預設）= 短列上下各凹半格，整體置中
42	     *   - 'top'    = 所有列頂部對齊，短列底部凹整格
43	     *   - 'bottom' = 所有列底部對齊，短列頂部凹整格
44	     *
45	     * Standard 模式下各列 targetSymbolCount 通常相同，此欄位無視覺差異（仍由遮罩決定可見範圍）。
46	     */
47	    columnAlignment: 'center' | 'top' | 'bottom';
48	}
49	
50	/**
51	 * @ch 預設配置集合
52	 * @description 各遊戲可直接套用其中之一，或自訂後傳入 SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()
53	 */
54	export const REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS = {
55	    /**@ch 標準轉輪（上中下三層滾動，凹字型可視範圍） */
56	    standard: {
57	        plateCount: 3,
58	        columns: [
59	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 5 }, // col 0
60	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 1
61	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 2
62	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 3
63	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 4
64	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 5 }, // col 5
65	        ],
66	        fakeSymbolStrategy: 'random',
67	        replacementTiming: 1.0,
68	        columnAlignment: 'center',
69	    } as ReelLayoutConfig,
70	
71	    /**@ch DropEntry 模式（單層，符號從上方掉入） */
72	    dropEntry: {
73	        plateCount: 1,
74	        columns: [
75	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 5 }, // col 0
76	            { targetSymbolCount: 4, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 1
77	            { targetSymbolCount: 4, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 2
78	            { targetSymbolCount: 4, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 3
79	            { targetSymbolCount: 4, visibleSymbolCount: 4 }, // col 4
80	            { targetSymbolCount: 5, visibleSymbolCount: 5 }, // col 5
81	        ],
82	        fakeSymbolStrategy: 'random',
83	        replacementTiming: 1.0,
84	        columnAlignment: 'center',
85	    } as ReelLayoutConfig,
86	};

input.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

`uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client` is a **Cocos Creator 3.6.2** client for a UK-market online slot machine game ("Leprechaun's Pots"), built from the company's internal `uk_slot_template`. Game logic lives in `assets/Script/`; presentation/business primitives (bottom bar, autoplay, buy-bonus, jackpot, messaging, networking) come from the proprietary **astarte-framework** editor extension, imported via the `db://astarte-framework/...` virtual path.

## Setup / Environment

This repo does not vendor the framework or protocol — they're pulled in separately:

1. Copy `gameSetting.json` to the project root (already present) and set the Proto repo's git URL/branch in it.
2. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat` (or `FirstClone_py3.bat`) to clone `extensions/` (astarte-framework, etc.) and the proto sources.
3. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat` to pull updates later.
4. `extensions/` is itself a separate git repository (`slotExtensions-client`) nested inside this one — do not edit files under `extensions/astarte-framework` as if they were project code; framework fixes belong upstream. See "Framework vs. game code" below.

There is no CLI build/lint/test pipeline — this project is developed and built through the **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 Editor** (Project > Build). `library/`, `temp/`, `local/`, `profiles/`, `settings/` are editor-managed caches; never hand-edit them.

## Tests

Only plain-function unit tests exist, run directly with ts-node (no test runner/config):

```
npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts
```

Add new pure-logic tests (no `cc` engine dependency) alongside this one in `tests/`, using `node:assert` and the same `test(name, fn)` pattern.

## Architecture

### State machine (core game flow)

`GameView.ts` is the top-level `Component` and orchestrator. In `SetStateMachine()` it registers one state instance per enum value from `Game_Define.GameState` (plus shared `CommonState` values like `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES` from astarte-framework) into `stateManager` (astarte-framework singleton), and drives it via `stateManager.Tick(dt)` in `update()`. Each state lives in `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts` and takes the `GameView` instance in its constructor to reach shared game state.

Representative flow: `WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END → (ENTER_FREE/CHECK_JP/SCATTER_SHOW/ADD_FREE/LEAVE_FREE as applicable)`. `GameView.ForEndToNext()` decides whether round-end goes to another free-game spin or back to `IDLE`.

To add a new state: add an enum entry to `GAMEVIEW_STATE` in `Game_Define.ts`, create the state class in `GameState/`, and register it in `GameView.SetStateMachine()`.

### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)

`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:

- **Standard**: stop → award directly.
- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).

Fill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused "dead" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. See `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md` for the full guide, constructor tuning options, and DevTool console commands (`ReelDevTool`).

Board layout (row/column counts, visible vs. buffered symbol counts per layout mode) is data-driven via `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard` (3-layer scrolling reel) / `.dropEntry` (1-layer, symbols drop in) — set once via `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` before `CreateSymbol()`.

### Symbols

`Game_Define.ts` is the central config: the `Symbol` enum (WILD, paytable letters/majors, CASH/JP tiers, SCATTER variants, FEATURE symbols), board dimensions (`COL`/`ROW`), the `FEATURES` flag map (which game mechanics are enabled), NearWin/Scatter tuning tables, and misc timing constants. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).

### Networking / protocol

`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.

`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.

### Presentation layers

- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.
- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).
- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.
- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).
- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).

### Framework vs. game code

Anything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo. Game-specific code under `assets/Script/` should consume that framework's public API, not modify it in place.

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

`uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client` is a **Cocos Creator 3.6.2** client for a UK-market online slot machine game ("Leprechaun's Pots"), built from the company's internal `uk_slot_template`. Game logic lives in `assets/Script/`; presentation/business primitives (bottom bar, autoplay, buy-bonus, jackpot, messaging, networking) come from the proprietary **astarte-framework** editor extension, imported via the `db://astarte-framework/...` virtual path.

## Setup / Environment

This repo does not vendor the framework or protocol — they're pulled in separately:

1. Copy `gameSetting.json` to the project root (already present) and set the Proto repo's git URL/branch in it.
2. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat` (or `FirstClone_py3.bat`) to clone `extensions/` (astarte-framework, etc.) and the proto sources.
3. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat` to pull updates later.
4. `extensions/` is itself a separate git repository (`slotExtensions-client`) nested inside this one — do not edit files under `extensions/astarte-framework` as if they were project code; framework fixes belong upstream. See "Framework vs. game code" below.

There is no CLI build/lint/test pipeline — this project is developed and built through the **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 Editor** (Project > Build). `library/`, `temp/`, `local/`, `profiles/`, `settings/` are editor-managed caches; never hand-edit them.

## Tests

Only plain-function unit tests exist, run directly with ts-node (no test runner/config):

```
npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts
```

Add new pure-logic tests (no `cc` engine dependency) alongside this one in `tests/`, using `node:assert` and the same `test(name, fn)` pattern.

## Architecture

### State machine (core game flow)

`GameView.ts` is the top-level `Component` and orchestrator. In `SetStateMachine()` it registers one state instance per enum value from `Game_Define.GameState` (plus shared `CommonState` values like `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES` from astarte-framework) into `stateManager` (astarte-framework singleton), and drives it via `stateManager.Tick(dt)` in `update()`. Each state lives in `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts` and takes the `GameView` instance in its constructor to reach shared game state.

Representative flow: `WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END → (ENTER_FREE/CHECK_JP/SCATTER_SHOW/ADD_FREE/LEAVE_FREE as applicable)`. `GameView.ForEndToNext()` decides whether round-end goes to another free-game spin or back to `IDLE`.

To add a new state: add an enum entry to `GAMEVIEW_STATE` in `Game_Define.ts`, create the state class in `GameState/`, and register it in `GameView.SetStateMachine()`.

### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)

`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:

- **Standard**: stop → award directly.
- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).

Fill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused "dead" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. See `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md` for the full guide, constructor tuning options, and DevTool console commands (`ReelDevTool`).

Board layout (row/column counts, visible vs. buffered symbol counts per layout mode) is data-driven via `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard` (3-layer scrolling reel) / `.dropEntry` (1-layer, symbols drop in) — set once via `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` before `CreateSymbol()`.

### Symbols

`Game_Define.ts` is the central config: the `Symbol` enum (WILD, paytable letters/majors, CASH/JP tiers, SCATTER variants, FEATURE symbols), board dimensions (`COL`/`ROW`), the `FEATURES` flag map (which game mechanics are enabled), NearWin/Scatter tuning tables, and misc timing constants. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).

### Networking / protocol

`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.

`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.

### Presentation layers

- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.
- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).
- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.
- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).
- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).

### Framework vs. game code

Anything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo. Game-specific code under `assets/Script/` should consume that framework's public API, not modify it in place.

本檔案為 Claude Code（claude.ai/code）在此專案中工作時的指引。

## 專案概覽

`uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client` 是一款 **Cocos Creator 3.6.2** 開發的英國市場線上老虎機遊戲（「Leprechaun's Pots」）用戶端，由公司內部的 `uk_slot_template` 樣板衍生而來。遊戲邏輯放在 `assets/Script/`；底條、自動玩、購買 Bonus、Jackpot、訊息框、連線等共用元件則來自公司內部的 **astarte-framework** 編輯器擴充套件，透過 `db://astarte-framework/...` 虛擬路徑匯入。

1. 把 `gameSetting.json` 複製到專案根目錄（目前已存在），並設定內部 Proto repo 的 git 路徑與 branch。
2. 執行 `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat`（或 `FirstClone_py3.bat`）以 clone `extensions/`（含 astarte-framework 等）與 Proto 原始碼。
3. 之後要更新則執行 `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat`。
4. `extensions/` 本身是另一個獨立的 git repo（`slotExtensions-client`），巢狀掛在本專案底下 — **不要**把 `extensions/astarte-framework` 底下的檔案當作專案程式碼來改；框架的修正應該回到上游 repo。詳見下方「框架程式碼 vs. 遊戲程式碼」。

本專案沒有 CLI 建置/lint/測試流程 — 開發與建置都是透過 **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 編輯器**（Project > Build）進行。`library/`、`temp/`、`local/`、`profiles/`、`settings/` 都是編輯器自動管理的快取目錄，不要手動編輯。

## 測試

目前只有純函式的單元測試，直接用 ts-node 執行（沒有測試框架/設定檔）：

```
npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts
```

新增純邏輯測試（不依賴 `cc` 引擎）時，比照這支檔案的寫法放到 `tests/` 目錄下，使用 `node:assert` 與相同的 `test(name, fn)` pattern。

## 架構

### 狀態機（遊戲核心流程）

`GameView.ts` 是最上層的 `Component`，同時也是整個遊戲的協調者。在 `SetStateMachine()` 中，會把 `Game_Define.GameState` 每個列舉值（以及 astarte-framework 提供的共用 `CommonState`，如 `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES`）各自對應一個狀態實例，註冊進 `stateManager`（astarte-framework 的單例），並在 `update()` 中透過 `stateManager.Tick(dt)` 驅動。每個狀態類別放在 `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts`，建構子會傳入 `GameView` 實例以存取共用的遊戲狀態。

代表性流程：`WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]*（消除/補位循環）→ AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END →（視情況進入 ENTER_FREE / CHECK_JP / SCATTER_SHOW / ADD_FREE / LEAVE_FREE）`。`GameView.ForEndToNext()` 負責判斷 round-end 之後要繼續下一輪免費遊戲的 spin，還是回到 `IDLE`。

新增狀態時：在 `Game_Define.ts` 的 `GAMEVIEW_STATE` 加上列舉值 → 在 `GameState/` 建立對應的狀態類別 → 在 `GameView.SetStateMachine()` 註冊。

### 轉輪與補位策略（Standard / Cascade / Tumble）

`SlotReels.ts`（`SlotReel` component）持有轉輪的每一列（`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`），並把停輪後的表演邏輯委派給可替換的 `IFillStrategy`（放在 `FillStrategy/`），透過 `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)` 切換：

- **Standard**：停輪後直接報獎。
- **Cascade**/**Tumble**：停輪後反覆執行 `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP`（消除中獎符號、上方符號天降補位）直到無可消除，才報獎。Cascade 是逐格掉落（適合中獎線玩法）；Tumble 是整列同步掉落（適合全盤消除／Ways 玩法）。

各補位策略都實作固定的三階段 `fillColumn`：存活符號下沉 → 借用已消除的 cell 承載新符號掉入 → 呼叫 `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` 把 cell 陣列索引與新的視覺位置對齊。若跳過重排這一步，下一輪的 explode 判定就會跟畫面對不上。完整說明、建構子可調參數與 DevTool console 指令（`ReelDevTool`）請見 `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md`。

盤面結構（列數/行數、各模式的可見與緩衝符號數量）由 `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` 資料驅動 → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard`（三層滾動式轉輪）／`.dropEntry`（單層，符號從上方掉入），需在 `CreateSymbol()` 之前透過 `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` 設定一次。

### Symbol

`Game_Define.ts` 是整個遊戲的核心設定檔：`Symbol` 列舉（WILD、賠付表字母/大獎符號、CASH/JP 等級、各種 SCATTER、FEATURE 符號）、盤面尺寸（`COL`/`ROW`）、`FEATURES` 功能開關表、NearWin/Scatter 相關調整參數，以及其他各種時間常數。Symbol 圖片依 `Symbol_XX` 檔名慣例從遊戲 bundle 動態載入（見 `GameView.LoadSymbol`）。

### 連線 / 協定

`Proto.ts` 重新匯出 `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` 這支由 protobufjs 產生的模組（雖然放在 `Test` 資料夾，但這是實際執行時使用的正式協定檔，並非測試用假資料）。`GameView.OnCommand()` 是 `ConnectionManager` 的 callback，負責把收到的 buffer（`info`、`spin`/`lastSpin`、`unshow`）解碼成對應的 `ar2lpProto.*` 訊息。`RecoverSpinAck.ts` 負責把伺服器回傳的原始盤面資料正規化／轉換，供轉輪元件使用。

`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` 時，`GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` 會在本機端自行產生假的 spin 結果，不會真的打後端 — 在開發環境判斷連線行為前，記得先確認這個旗標的狀態。

### 表演層

- `EffectPlate/` — 盤面中獎表演（中獎框、symbol spine 動畫），見 `EffectPlate.ts`、`EffectSpine.ts`、`SymbolSpine.ts`。
- `Spine/` — 共用的 spine 播放輔助元件（`BaseSpine`、`InLoopOutSpine`）。
- `FreeGame/` — 免費遊戲進場/離場宣告演出。
- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — 音效/BGM 播放（另有自己的 `使用說明.md`）。
- `Common/` — 通用輔助工具（節點池、數字/圖片補間動畫、輪盤旋轉、非同步工具等）。

### 框架程式碼 vs. 遊戲程式碼

只要是從 `db://astarte-framework/...` 匯入的東西（例如 `newBottombarManager`、`newExtraManager`、`msgBoxManager`、`stateManager`、`commonGameManager`、`eventManager`、`ConnectionManager`，以及共用的 `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`），都是跨專案共用、獨立版控在 `extensions/astarte-framework` 的公版框架程式碼。`assets/Script/` 底下的遊戲專屬程式碼應該只呼叫該框架的公開 API，而不是直接修改它。

-### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)
+### 轉輪與補位策略（Standard / Cascade / Tumble）

-`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:
+`SlotReels.ts`（`SlotReel` component）持有轉輪的每一列（`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`），並把停輪後的表演邏輯委派給可替換的 `IFillStrategy`（放在 `FillStrategy/`），透過 `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)` 切換：
-- **Standard**: stop → award directly.

-- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).
+- **Standard**：停輪後直接報獎。
+- **Cascade**/**Tumble**：停輪後反覆執行 `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP`（消除中獎符號、上方符號天降補位）直到無可消除，才報獎。Cascade 是逐格掉落（適合中獎線玩法）；Tumble 是整列同步掉落（適合全盤消除／Ways 玩法）。

-Fill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused "dead" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. See `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md` for the full guide, constructor tuning options, and DevTool console commands (`ReelDevTool`).

+各補位策略都實作固定的三階段 `fillColumn`：存活符號下沉 → 借用已消除的 cell 承載新符號掉入 → 呼叫 `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` 把 cell 陣列索引與新的視覺位置對齊。若跳過重排這一步，下一輪的 explode 判定就會跟畫面對不上。完整說明、建構子可調參數與 DevTool console 指令（`ReelDevTool`）請見 `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md`。

-Board layout (row/column counts, visible vs. buffered symbol counts per layout mode) is data-driven via `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard` (3-layer scrolling reel) / `.dropEntry` (1-layer, symbols drop in) — set once via `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` before `CreateSymbol()`.
+盤面結構（列數/行數、各模式的可見與緩衝符號數量）由 `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` 資料驅動 → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard`（三層滾動式轉輪）／`.dropEntry`（單層，符號從上方掉入），需在 `CreateSymbol()` 之前透過 `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` 設定一次。
-### Symbols
+### Symbol

-`Game_Define.ts` is the central config: the `Symbol` enum (WILD, paytable letters/majors, CASH/JP tiers, SCATTER variants, FEATURE symbols), board dimensions (`COL`/`ROW`), the `FEATURES` flag map (which game mechanics are enabled), NearWin/Scatter tuning tables, and misc timing constants. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).

+`Game_Define.ts` 是整個遊戲的核心設定檔：`Symbol` 列舉（WILD、賠付表字母/大獎符號、CASH/JP 等級、各種 SCATTER、FEATURE 符號）、盤面尺寸（`COL`/`ROW`）、`FEATURES` 功能開關表、NearWin/Scatter 相關調整參數，以及其他各種時間常數。Symbol 圖片依 `Symbol_XX` 檔名慣例從遊戲 bundle 動態載入（見 `GameView.LoadSymbol`）。
-### Networking / protocol
+### 連線 / 協定

-`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.

+`Proto.ts` 重新匯出 `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` 這支由 protobufjs 產生的模組（雖然放在 `Test` 資料夾，但這是實際執行時使用的正式協定檔，並非測試用假資料）。`GameView.OnCommand()` 是 `ConnectionManager` 的 callback，負責把收到的 buffer（`info`、`spin`/`lastSpin`、`unshow`）解碼成對應的 `ar2lpProto.*` 訊息。`RecoverSpinAck.ts` 負責把伺服器回傳的原始盤面資料正規化／轉換，供轉輪元件使用。

-`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.
+`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` 時，`GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` 會在本機端自行產生假的 spin 結果，不會真的打後端 — 在開發環境判斷連線行為前，記得先確認這個旗標的狀態。
-### Presentation layers
+### 表演層
-- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.
-- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).
-- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.
-- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).
-- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).
+- `EffectPlate/` — 盤面中獎表演（中獎框、symbol spine 動畫），見 `EffectPlate.ts`、`EffectSpine.ts`、`SymbolSpine.ts`。
+- `Spine/` — 共用的 spine 播放輔助元件（`BaseSpine`、`InLoopOutSpine`）。
+- `FreeGame/` — 免費遊戲進場/離場宣告演出。
+- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — 音效/BGM 播放（另有自己的 `使用說明.md`）。
+- `Common/` — 通用輔助工具（節點池、數字/圖片補間動畫、輪盤旋轉、非同步工具等）。
-### Framework vs. game code
+### 框架程式碼 vs. 遊戲程式碼

-Anything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo. Game-specific code under `assets/Script/` should consume that framework's public API, not modify it in place.

+只要是從 `db://astarte-framework/...` 匯入的東西（例如 `newBottombarManager`、`newExtraManager`、`msgBoxManager`、`stateManager`、`commonGameManager`、`eventManager`、`ConnectionManager`，以及共用的 `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`），都是跨專案共用、獨立版控在 `extensions/astarte-framework` 的公版框架程式碼。`assets/Script/` 底下的遊戲專屬程式碼應該只呼叫該框架的公開 API，而不是直接修改它。

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

`uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client` is a **Cocos Creator 3.6.2** client for a UK-market online slot machine game ("Leprechaun's Pots"), built from the company's internal `uk_slot_template`. Game logic lives in `assets/Script/`; presentation/business primitives (bottom bar, autoplay, buy-bonus, jackpot, messaging, networking) come from the proprietary **astarte-framework** editor extension, imported via the `db://astarte-framework/...` virtual path.

## Setup / Environment

This repo does not vendor the framework or protocol — they're pulled in separately:

1. Copy `gameSetting.json` to the project root (already present) and set the Proto repo's git URL/branch in it.
2. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat` (or `FirstClone_py3.bat`) to clone `extensions/` (astarte-framework, etc.) and the proto sources.
3. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat` to pull updates later.
4. `extensions/` is itself a separate git repository (`slotExtensions-client`) nested inside this one — do not edit files under `extensions/astarte-framework` as if they were project code; framework fixes belong upstream. See "Framework vs. game code" below.

There is no CLI build/lint/test pipeline — this project is developed and built through the **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 Editor** (Project > Build). `library/`, `temp/`, `local/`, `profiles/`, `settings/` are editor-managed caches; never hand-edit them.

## Tests

Only plain-function unit tests exist, run directly with ts-node (no test runner/config):

```
npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts
```

Add new pure-logic tests (no `cc` engine dependency) alongside this one in `tests/`, using `node:assert` and the same `test(name, fn)` pattern.

## Architecture

### State machine (core game flow)

`GameView.ts` is the top-level `Component` and orchestrator. In `SetStateMachine()` it registers one state instance per enum value from `Game_Define.GameState` (plus shared `CommonState` values like `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES` from astarte-framework) into `stateManager` (astarte-framework singleton), and drives it via `stateManager.Tick(dt)` in `update()`. Each state lives in `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts` and takes the `GameView` instance in its constructor to reach shared game state.

Representative flow: `WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END → (ENTER_FREE/CHECK_JP/SCATTER_SHOW/ADD_FREE/LEAVE_FREE as applicable)`. `GameView.ForEndToNext()` decides whether round-end goes to another free-game spin or back to `IDLE`.

To add a new state: add an enum entry to `GAMEVIEW_STATE` in `Game_Define.ts`, create the state class in `GameState/`, and register it in `GameView.SetStateMachine()`.

### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)

`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:

- **Standard**: stop → award directly.
- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).

Fill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused "dead" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. See `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md` for the full guide, constructor tuning options, and DevTool console commands (`ReelDevTool`).

Board layout (row/column counts, visible vs. buffered symbol counts per layout mode) is data-driven via `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard` (3-layer scrolling reel) / `.dropEntry` (1-layer, symbols drop in) — set once via `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` before `CreateSymbol()`.

### Symbols

`Game_Define.ts` is the central config: the `Symbol` enum (WILD, paytable letters/majors, CASH/JP tiers, SCATTER variants, FEATURE symbols), board dimensions (`COL`/`ROW`), the `FEATURES` flag map (which game mechanics are enabled), NearWin/Scatter tuning tables, and misc timing constants. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).

### Networking / protocol

`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.

`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.

### Presentation layers

- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.
- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).
- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.
- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).
- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).

### Framework vs. game code

Anything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo. Game-specific code under `assets/Script/` should consume that framework's public API, not modify it in place.

# dev:init-claude — 開發設計閉環初始化

為當前專案部署「開發設計閉環」方法論的 CLAUDE.md 和補充文檔。

**用戶參數**：

**模式**：
- `/dev:init-claude` 或 `/dev:init-claude [專案名稱]` — 部署/升級（預設）
- `/dev:init-claude status` — 快速查看版本和健康狀態
- `/dev:init-claude upgrade` — 從 GitHub 下載最新版，更新 Skill 和快取
- `/dev:init-claude uninstall` — 移除閉環部署

---

## 模板來源（由 setup.sh 安裝時自動替換路徑）

```
模板檔案：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/CLAUDE_TEMPLATE.md
文檔目錄：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/.claudedocs/
語言指南：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/.claudedocs/languages/
Hook 腳本：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/hooks/
部署腳本：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/deploy-hooks.sh
版本檢查：/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/check-version.sh
```

> **v7.0.0 workflow 說明**：v7 的四個 workflow 腳本（`/dev-prd` `/dev-design` `/dev-review` `/dev-verify`）由 **setup.sh 全域部署到 `~/.claude/workflows/`**，不由本 skill per-project 部署——workflow 是 Claude Code 原生功能，全域註冊即所有專案可用。本 skill 只部署專案層的 CLAUDE.md + `.claudedocs/` + hooks（含 agent 素材庫，供 workflow 引用）。workflow 需 Claude Code v2.1.154+ · 付費方案 · research preview；不可用時方法論走 CLAUDE.md Section 14 退化路徑，承重核（always-on hook）不受影響。

---

## ⛔ 模式分流（最優先，在執行任何步驟前必須完成）

**Claude 必須在載入此 Skill 後立即執行以下判斷，禁止跳過。**

解析 `` 的第一個詞，根據下表跳轉到對應模式的 section：

| 第一個詞 | 模式 | 跳轉目標 |
|---------|------|---------|
| `status` | 狀態檢查 | → 下方「Status 模式」 |
| `upgrade` | 自我更新 | → 下方「Upgrade 模式」 |
| `uninstall` | 移除部署 | → 下方「Uninstall 模式」 |
| 其他（含空） | 部署/升級 | → 下方「部署/升級流程 Step 0」 |

⛔ **若匹配到 status / upgrade / uninstall，直接跳轉到對應 section，禁止執行「部署/升級流程」的任何步驟。**

---

## Status 模式（`/dev:init-claude status`）

快速查看當前專案的閉環部署狀態和健康度。不修改任何檔案。

### 步驟

1. **版本偵測**：
   - 用 Grep 搜尋 `CLAUDE.md` 中的 `closed-loop v` 字串
   - 找到 → 提取版本號
   - 找不到 CLAUDE.md → 輸出「⚠️ 閉環未部署。執行 `/dev:init-claude` 開始部署」並結束
   - 有 CLAUDE.md 但無版本標記 → 輸出「ℹ️ CLAUDE.md 存在但非閉環部署」並結束

2. **配置提取**：從 CLAUDE.md 提取已部署的專案配置（語言/框架/測試指令/建置指令）

3. **健康檢查**（逐項用 Bash 檢查，每項標 ✅/❌/⚠️）：

   | 檢查項 | 方法 | 判定 |
   |--------|------|------|
   | 核心文檔 | `ls .claudedocs/` 數量 | 11 個 = ✅，< 11 = ❌ 列出缺少 |
   | 語言指南 | `.claudedocs/languages/*.md` 是否存在 | 有 = ✅ [語言]，無 = — 未部署 |
   | 修改前統一守衛 Hook | `.claude/hooks/impact-analysis-guard.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | 增量驗證 Hook | `.claude/hooks/incremental-lint.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | 委派追蹤 Hook | `.claude/hooks/delegation-tracker.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | 委派前閘門 Hook | `.claude/hooks/delegation-gate.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | 理解確認旗標 Hook | `.claude/hooks/prompt-understanding-guard.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | 學習日誌提醒 Hook | `.claude/hooks/learning-log-checker.sh` 存在且可執行 | ✅/❌ |
   | Hook 配置 | `.claude/settings.json` 含 `impact-analysis-guard`、`delegation-gate`、`incremental-lint`、`delegation-tracker`、`prompt-understanding-guard`、`learning-log-checker` | 6/6 = ✅，否則 ⚠️ 列出缺少 |
   | Placeholder 殘留 | Grep CLAUDE.md 中的 `{{` | 無 = ✅，有 = ❌ 列出殘留 |
   | 快取/來源目錄 | `/c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/` 是否存在 | 有 = ✅，無 = ⚠️ 來源不可達 |
   | 閉環狀態目錄 | `.claude-loop/` 是否存在 | 有 = ℹ️ 存在，無 = — 未啟用（正常） |
   | Workflow 腳本（全域·可選）| `ls ~/.claude/workflows/dev-prd.js dev-design.js dev-review.js dev-verify.js` | 4/4 = ✅ 全域可用，部分/無 = ℹ️ 未部署（走 Section 14 退化路徑，屬正常）|

4. **⛔ 可升級偵測（禁止跳過）**：
   此步驟是 status 模式的核心功能之一，**即使前面的健康檢查全部通過也必須執行**。不執行此步驟就等於沒有完成 status 檢查。
   用 Bash 執行版本檢查腳本：
   ```bash
   bash /c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/dev-closed-loop/check-version.sh /c/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools --deployed ./CLAUDE.md --check-remote
   ```
   根據輸出的 STATUS 值判斷：
   - `upgrade_available` 或 `cache_outdated` → 顯示「🔄 可升級：v{DEPLOYED_VERSION} → v{CACHE_VERSION 或 REMOTE_VERSION}。執行 `/dev:init-claude upgrade` 升級」
   - `up_to_date` → 顯示「✅ 已是最新版本」
   - `up_to_date` 且 `SHA_MISMATCH=true` → 顯示「✅ 版本相同，但有未發版的改動（本地 SHA: {前7碼} ≠ 遠端 SHA: {前7碼}）。執行 `/dev:init-claude upgrade` 取得最新」
   - `REMOTE_CHECK=failed` 且 `STATUS=up_to_date` → 顯示「✅ 與快取版本一致（⚠️ 無法連線 GitHub 確認遠端版本）」
   - `STATUS=error` → 顯示「⚠️ 無法確認版本」
   - **⛔ 必須在輸出中包含「升級：」行**，不論結果是什麼。缺少此行 = status 輸出不完整

5. **輸出格式（⛔ 必須包含以下所有區塊，禁止省略任何區塊）**：

```
═══ 閉環部署狀態 ═══

版本：v5.7.0（SHA: abc1234）
來源：~/.claude/cache/ClaudeCodeTools/  [或本地 repo 路徑]
專案：[名稱]
語言：[語言] | 框架：[框架]

健康檢查：
  ✅ 核心文檔（10/10）
  ✅ 語言指南：typescript.md
  ✅ 修改前統一守衛 Hook（雙閘門阻擋）
  ✅ 理解確認旗標 Hook
  ✅ 增量驗證 Hook
  ✅ 委派追蹤 Hook
  ✅ 委派前閘門 Hook（修改型 Agent 因果鏈分析）
  ✅ 學習日誌提醒 Hook
  ✅ Hook 配置（6/6）
  ✅ 無 Placeholder 殘留
  — .claude-loop/ 未啟用
  ℹ️ Workflow（全域）：/dev-prd /dev-design /dev-review /dev-verify  [或] — 未部署（走退化路徑，正常）

升級：✅ 已是最新版本
  [或] 🔄 可升級：v5.7.0 → v5.8.0。執行 /dev:init-claude upgrade 升級

整體：✅ 健康（8/8 通過）
```

若有問題：
```
整體：⚠️ 有問題（6/8 通過）
  ❌ 修改前統一守衛 Hook 缺失 → 執行 /dev:init-claude upgrade 升級修復
  ❌ Hook 配置不完整 → 執行 /dev:init-claude upgrade 升級修復
```
